title: Generic Flow must not hard-code host-domain behavior
statement: Generic Flow backend and frontend packages MUST NOT import, branch on, mutate, or otherwise special-case CMS, PORM opportunity, proposal, engagement, or any host-domain behavior outside the registered Flow domain adapter contract.
rationale: STYNX Flow is a framework module. PORM contains useful workflow machinery, but portions of its runtime are coupled to PORM domains. Porting those couplings would prevent reuse and violate the STYNX module boundary.
